name: Cataclysm Survival Extension
description: A vanilla-style H-release content expansion adding grounded scavenger tools, improvised survivor weapons, rough protective gear, storage rigs, intermediate scrapcraft materials, field manuals, recipes, profession kits, lore-friendly starting professions, broad vanilla item-group integration, and a custom 32x32 mod tileset covering all CSE custom items, with halo-cleaned transparent sprites. JSON layout consolidated in 0.6.2. No mapgen, no regional conversion. Item group entries normalized in 0.6.3. Vanilla item-group integration patches now use copy-from + extend.items object entries in 0.6.4. Vanilla item-group individual item entries now include explicit count arrays in 0.6.5. Vanilla same-id item-group patches confirmed to omit subtype/collection fields in 0.6.6, while CSE-owned groups keep their required subtype. Hotfix 0.6.9 removes accidental loadable tiles manifest, fixes illegal medicine charges in item groups, repairs invalid vanilla IDs, corrects H-release weapon recipe subcategories, and replaces nonexistent athletics skill.
